join_order.notes: Load pre-built sorted array of 8,631,890 unique uint64 keys into unordered_set<uint64_t> reserved at 2x capacity (~130MB). Probe with key = ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)adsh_code << 32) | (uint32_t)tagver_code. Row passes anti-join if key is ABSENT from set. tagver_code=-1 casts to 0xFFFFFFFF — valid non-matching key, always passes.

filters.notes: usd_code loaded from indexes/uom_codes.bin — never hardcoded. Zone map: skip block b if zm[b].min_uom > usd_code || zm[b].max_uom < usd_code.
Zone map: skip block b if zm[b].max_ddate < 20230101 || zm[b].min_ddate > 20231231. Applied jointly with uom zone map — combined skip is very aggressive (~0.17% rows survive ≈ 67K rows).
Check value != NaN after ddate+uom filters pass. Applied before anti-join probe.

data_structures.thread_local_agg: each thread owns private cnt[] and sum[] arrays (1070663 entries each, ~17MB/thread); merged into global arrays after scan
data_structures.zone_maps: loaded once from indexes/num_zone_maps.bin — 395 ZoneMap structs (12 bytes each, struct layout: int8 min_uom@0, int8 max_uom@1, [pad@2-3], int32 min_ddate@4, int32 max_ddate@8)

parallelism.notes: Each thread takes a block morsel, applies zone-map check (skip entire block if filtered), then row-level uom+ddate+value+anti-join filters, then accumulates into thread-local direct arrays. Master thread merges all thread-local arrays element-wise after scan completes. Post-scan steps (HAVING, sort, decode) are single-threaded — result set is tiny.

indexes.purpose: anti_join_set — read header uint64_t n_unique, bulk-load n_unique uint64_t keys, insert into reserved unordered_set
skip_blocks — dual filter on uom_code and ddate ranges before row-level scan
dict_lookup — resolve 'USD' string to int8_t usd_code at startup

aggregation_notes: Group by tagver_code (int32_t, range [0, 1070662]). Use tagver_code directly as array index into cnt[]/sum[] direct arrays. After merge, iterate array to collect entries where cnt > 10 (HAVING). tagver_code=-1 treated as uint32_t index 0xFFFFFFFF — out of range, skip safely (these rows always pass anti-join but cannot be grouped; handle by guard: if (tagver_code < 0 || tagver_code >= TAG_COUNT) skip group accumulation).

output.decode: After top-100 selection, decode tag and version strings using tag/tag_offsets.bin + tag/tag_data.bin and tag/version_offsets.bin + tag/version_data.bin indexed by tagver_code
